read_occupancy.script:
import urllib.request, json
response = urllib.request.urlopen('http://192.168.1.220:8080/api/sensor?id=dev_1_3')
data = json.loads(response.read().decode('utf-8'))
print(data.get('occupancy', 0))

subscribe_occupancy.script:
import urllib.request
response = urllib.request.urlopen('http://192.168.1.220:8080/api/subscribe?id=dev_1_3')
for line in response:
    print(line.decode('utf-8').strip())

set_level.script:
import sys, urllib.request
matter_level = int(sys.argv[1]) if len(sys.argv) > 1 else 254
brightness = matter_level / 254.0
urllib.request.urlopen(f'http://192.168.1.220:8080/api/set?id=dev_1_8&brightness={brightness}')

read_level.script:
import urllib.request, json
response = urllib.request.urlopen('http://192.168.1.220:8080/api/lights')
data = json.loads(response.read().decode('utf-8'))
device = next((d for d in data if d.get('id') == 'dev_1_8'), {})
brightness = device.get('brightness', 0.0)
print(int(brightness * 254))

set_color_temperature.script:
import sys, urllib.request
mireds = int(sys.argv[1]) if len(sys.argv) > 1 else 250
kelvin = int(1000000 / mireds) if mireds > 0 else 4000
urllib.request.urlopen(f'http://192.168.1.220:8080/api/set?id=dev_1_8&temperature={kelvin}')

read_color_temperature.script:
import urllib.request, json
response = urllib.request.urlopen('http://192.168.1.220:8080/api/lights')
data = json.loads(response.read().decode('utf-8'))
device = next((d for d in data if d.get('id') == 'dev_1_8'), {})
kelvin = device.get('temperature', 4000)
mireds = int(1000000 / kelvin) if kelvin and kelvin > 0 else 0
print(mireds)
